title: EaseonSS - XpBooster
description: Multiply monster experience drops by 1-100x. Configurable in-game with commands.
body:
# 🌿 Easeon - XP Booster **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview Enhance your Minecraft experience with adjustable XP multipliers for monster kills!
## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission by default. | Command | Description | | ---------------------------- | ------------------------ | | /easeon xpbooster | View current setting | | /easeon xpbooster <1-100> | Change XP multiplier |
Configuration ```json { "value": 2, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.xpbooster.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
